agent1 (Round 2 summarized): Machine learning has potential advantages in pattern detection within large datasets but lacks conclusive empirical evidence proving it consistently outperforms traditional statistical methods in survival analysis. Current literature emphasizes concerns around model interpretation, data dependence, and missing rigorous validations comparing their predictive accuracy side-by-side. 

Final Answer:\boxed{B}

The summary should be concise and strictly based only on what was stated during the agent’s internal thought process—no external additions allowed.

Machine learning may offer improved pattern recognition in large datasets but currently lacks solid empirical proof of surpassing statistical methods in survival analysis outcomes. Existing evidence underscores issues related to interpretability, data sensitivity, and absent direct comparison studies validating higher predictive accuracy.  

\boxed{B}. Answer choice: B
